mapper.insert: INSERT INTO msg_users (nickname, password_hash, invite_token_used, avatar_color, role, is_active, created_at) VALUES (#{nickname}, #{passwordHash}, #{inviteTokenUsed}, #{avatarColor}, #{role}, #{isActive}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE msg_users SET last_seen_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, nickname, password_hash, invite_token_used, avatar_color, is_active, role, last_seen_at, created_at FROM msg_users WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY nickname ASC
